caption: A Pridefest banner hangs over Kirkwood Avenue. Pridefest is an event put on annually by Bloomington PRIDE, a local nonprofit organization.

caption: Attendees of Pridefest talk to a representative of the Indiana Graduate Workers Coalition. Vendors and different organizations set up booths along Kirkwood Avenue.

caption: Freshman Cassidy Phillips and IUPUI student Ava Fisher roller skate in circles while holding hands. Phillips said they usually do not attend pride events but made an exception because they feel Pridefest is a family-oriented event.

caption: Drag performer Arachna performs at Pridefest. The festival returned to Kirkwood Avenue after taking place virtually in 2020.
